rule: Catalan numbers
Start at 4 and successively add the squares of consecutive odd primes
Multiply successively by 12, 13, 14, alternating subtract 1 and add 1
Interleave successive squares and factorials
Catalan numbers C_n
Each difference is the square of successive odd primes
From the third term onward, a_n=(n+1)a_(n-1)+(-1)^n, with alternating signs
Odd positions are consecutive squares; even positions are consecutive factorials
